dct_title_s: Geological map of Inyo County, California
dct_description_sm: geology by C.A. Waring ; issued by the State Mining Bureau ; W.E. Condon, del.
Relief shown by contours and spot heights.
Inset: Vertical section along line A-B. Scale [ca. 1:253,440].
